session.user:
Run prettier --check on the following files and report results: - docs/learned/cli/learn-command-conditional-pipeline.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-pipeline-workflow.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-without-pr-context.md - docs/learned/planning/planned-pr-context-local-preprocessing.md

session.assistant: I'll run prettier --check on those files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on specified markdown files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All matched files use Prettier code style!
All 4 files conform to Prettier formatting standards: - docs/learned/cli/learn-command-conditional-pipeline.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-pipeline-workflow.md - docs/learned/planning/learn-without-pr-context.md - docs/learned/planning/planned-pr-context-local-preprocessing.md
